services.name: Basic Wedding Package
services.shortDesc: Your beautiful wedding website with RSVP management, guest list, and essential planning tools. Everything you need to get started.
services.metaTitle: Basic Wedding Package — Wedding Website & RSVP | Ceremoney
services.metaDescription: Create your stunning wedding website, collect RSVPs, and manage your guest list with Ceremoney's Basic plan. Start planning your perfect day today.
services.description:
The Basic Wedding Package gives you everything you need to launch your wedding presence online and start collecting RSVPs from your guests. Create a beautiful, personalized wedding website, manage your guest list, and keep track of responses — all in one place.

What's Included

  • Custom Wedding Website: Choose from elegant templates and customize colors, fonts, and content to match your wedding theme.
  • RSVP Management: Guests can RSVP directly through your website. Track attendance, dietary requirements, and plus-ones.
  • Guest List: Manage your complete guest list with contact details, RSVP status, and seating preferences.
  • Wedding Checklist: Built-in planning checklist with timeline reminders so you never miss a step.
  • Vendor Directory: Browse vetted local vendors for all your wedding needs.

Perfect For

Couples who want a beautiful online presence and straightforward guest management without the complexity of a full planning suite.

packages.name: Basic
packages.description: Essential tools to start your wedding journey

faqs.question: Is the Basic plan really free?
faqs.answer: Yes! The Basic plan is completely free with no credit card required. You get a beautiful wedding website, RSVP management, and planning tools at no cost.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade later?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. You can upgrade to Premium or Elite at any time, and all your existing data (guests, RSVPs, content) will carry over seamlessly.

services.name: Premium Wedding Package
services.shortDesc: Advanced guest management, seating chart designer, custom domain, PDF exports, and everything you need for a seamlessly organized wedding.
services.metaTitle: Premium Wedding Package — Full Guest & Seating Management | Ceremoney
services.metaDescription: Manage unlimited guests, design seating charts, use your own domain, and export professional PDFs with Ceremoney Premium. 299 SEK/month.
services.description:
The Premium Wedding Package is our most popular plan, designed for couples who want complete control over every aspect of their wedding organization. From unlimited guest management to a visual seating chart designer, Premium has everything you need.

What's Included

  • Unlimited Guest List: No limits on the number of guests you can manage. Add family, friends, and colleagues without restrictions.
  • Visual Seating Chart: Drag-and-drop seating chart designer. Arrange tables, assign guests, and print the final layout.
  • Custom Domain: Connect your own domain (e.g. emma-and-oliver.com) to your wedding website for a personal touch.
  • PDF & XLS Export: Export your guest list, seating chart, and RSVP data as professional PDF or Excel files.
  • Advanced RSVP: Track meal choices, dietary requirements, transport needs, and song requests per guest.
  • Everything in Basic

Most Popular Choice

Premium is perfect for couples planning a wedding of any size who want professional organization tools without compromise.

faqs.question: How does the seating chart work?
faqs.answer: Our drag-and-drop seating chart lets you create tables of any shape and size, then assign guests by dragging their names. You can print or export the final chart as a PDF.

faqs.question: Can I use my own domain?
faqs.answer: Yes! With Premium, you can connect any domain you own (purchased from registrars like Namecheap, GoDaddy, etc.) to your Ceremoney wedding website.

faqs.question: Is there a contract or commitment?
faqs.answer: No long-term commitment. Premium is billed monthly (299 SEK/mo) and you can cancel at any time.

services.name: Elite Wedding Package
services.shortDesc: The ultimate wedding planning experience. Stationery designer, QR code entrance scanning, team collaborators, SMS messaging, and white-glove support.
services.metaTitle: Elite Wedding Package — Stationery, QR Entry & Collaborators | Ceremoney
services.metaDescription: Design custom stationery, scan QR codes at the entrance, invite collaborators, and send SMS updates with Ceremoney Elite. 499 SEK/month.
services.description:
The Elite Wedding Package is our most comprehensive offering, built for couples who want a truly premium, end-to-end wedding planning experience. From custom digital stationery to real-time QR code entrance scanning, Elite covers every detail.

What's Included

  • Stationery Engine: Design and send beautiful digital invitations, save-the-dates, and thank-you cards from within Ceremoney.
  • QR Entrance Scanning: Each guest receives a unique QR code. Scan at the venue entrance for instant check-in and real-time attendance tracking.
  • Team Collaborators: Invite your wedding planner, maid of honor, or family members to help manage guests and planning tasks.
  • SMS Credits: Send SMS reminders, RSVP nudges, and day-of logistics to your guests directly from the platform.
  • Everything in Premium

For the Discerning Couple

Elite is designed for couples who want a seamless, luxury planning experience with every tool available at their fingertips.

faqs.question: How does QR entrance scanning work?
faqs.answer: Each guest automatically receives a unique QR code. At your venue entrance, simply scan the code with any smartphone to check them in and track real-time attendance.

faqs.question: How many collaborators can I invite?
faqs.answer: Elite allows you to invite multiple collaborators (e.g. wedding planner, maid of honor) who can help manage the guest list, RSVPs, and planning tasks.

faqs.question: How many SMS credits are included?
faqs.answer: Elite includes a monthly SMS credit allowance. Additional credits can be purchased as needed. Credits are used for guest reminders, RSVP nudges, and day-of updates.

services.name: Venue Coordination
services.shortDesc: Professional venue sourcing and coordination. We shortlist venues, negotiate contracts, and manage the logistics so you can focus on the joy.
services.metaDescription: Find and coordinate your perfect wedding venue with Ceremoney's venue coordination service. Shortlisting, contract negotiation, and full logistics management.
services.description:
Finding the perfect wedding venue is one of the most important decisions you'll make. Our Venue Coordination service takes the stress out of the search — we source venues that match your vision, budget, and guest count, then handle all the logistics from initial inquiry to contract signing.

What's Included

  • Venue Shortlist: We curate a personalized list of venues that match your style, capacity, and budget.
  • Site Visits: We arrange and accompany you on venue visits so you can experience each space firsthand.
  • Contract Negotiation: Our team reviews and negotiates venue contracts to ensure fair terms and protect your interests.
  • Logistics Planning: We coordinate parking, accessibility, backup plans for outdoor venues, and vendor access schedules.

faqs.question: How many venues will you shortlist?
faqs.answer: We shortlist up to 5 venues in the basic package, and unlimited venues in the full package. All are vetted to match your style, capacity, and budget.

services.name: Wedding Photography
services.shortDesc: Professional wedding photography and videography coordination. We match you with the right photographer and manage all contracts and deliverables.
services.metaDescription: Find your perfect wedding photographer with Ceremoney. We match you with vetted professionals, manage contracts, and ensure stunning memories.
services.description:
Your wedding photos are memories you'll cherish forever. Our Wedding Photography coordination service matches you with the ideal photographer for your style — whether you love documentary, romantic, or fine-art photography — and manages every detail from booking to final album delivery.

What's Included

  • Photographer Matching: We match you with vetted photographers whose portfolio aligns with your vision.
  • Contract Management: We review photographer contracts to ensure fair terms, clear deliverable timelines, and backup plans.
  • Timeline Coordination: We build a detailed photography timeline for your wedding day to ensure every key moment is captured.
  • Album Coordination: We manage the album design and delivery process post-wedding.

faqs.question: Do you provide the photographer directly?
faqs.answer: We coordinate and match you with vetted independent photographers. The final contract is between you and the photographer, with our support throughout.

services.name: Floral & Decor
services.shortDesc: Beautiful floral arrangements, centerpieces, ceremony arch, and complete venue styling that brings your wedding vision to life.
services.metaDescription: Coordinate stunning floral arrangements and venue decor for your wedding with Ceremoney. From ceremony arch to table centerpieces.
services.description:
Transform your venue into the wedding of your dreams with our Floral & Decor coordination. We work with talented local florists and decorators to bring your vision to life — from romantic garden-style bouquets to modern minimalist arrangements.

What's Included

  • Style Consultation: We define your floral vision with a detailed mood board and style consultation.
  • Florist Matching: We match you with florists whose work aligns with your aesthetic and budget.
  • Decor Planning: Ceremony arch, aisle arrangements, centerpieces, sweetheart table, and welcome table.
  • Setup Coordination: We coordinate delivery and setup timing with your venue to ensure everything is perfect.

faqs.question: Can I bring my own floral inspiration?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We encourage you to share Pinterest boards, magazine clippings, or photos. Our florists will work to match your vision as closely as possible.

services.name: Catering Management
services.shortDesc: Menu planning, caterer coordination, dietary management, and tasting sessions. Ensuring every guest is delighted at your table.
services.metaDescription: Coordinate perfect wedding catering with Ceremoney. Menu planning, caterer matching, dietary management, and tasting sessions included.
services.description:
Great food is at the heart of a memorable wedding celebration. Our Catering Management service handles everything from finding the perfect caterer to managing dietary requirements for every guest — ensuring a seamless, delicious experience.

What's Included

  • Caterer Matching: We source caterers who specialize in your preferred cuisine and can accommodate your guest count and budget.
  • Menu Planning: We work with the caterer to build a menu that reflects your taste and accommodates all dietary needs.
  • Tasting Sessions: We coordinate and join tasting sessions so you can approve every dish before the big day.
  • Dietary Management: We compile dietary requirements from your RSVP data and ensure the caterer has clear instructions for every guest.

faqs.question: How do you handle dietary requirements?
faqs.answer: We pull dietary data directly from your Ceremoney guest RSVP responses and create a clear dietary breakdown for your caterer, ensuring every guest is catered for.

services.name: Day-of Coordination
services.shortDesc: A dedicated coordinator manages your wedding day so you and your family can be fully present and enjoy every moment.
services.metaDescription: Enjoy your wedding day completely stress-free with Ceremoney's day-of coordination service. Your dedicated coordinator handles everything.
services.description:
You've planned everything — now it's time to enjoy it. Our Day-of Coordination service puts a dedicated coordinator on-site at your wedding to manage vendors, timeline, and any surprises, so you and your loved ones can be fully present for every beautiful moment.

What's Included

  • Pre-Wedding Meeting: A detailed briefing call 2 weeks before the wedding to review your full timeline, vendor contacts, and logistics.
  • Vendor Liaison: Your coordinator contacts all vendors the week before to confirm arrival times, setup details, and logistics.
  • On-Site Management: Full coordination from venue setup through to the last dance — managing vendors, timeline, and any unexpected issues.
  • Guest Management: Welcoming guests, directing to seats, and ensuring every guest has what they need throughout the day.
  • Emergency Kit: Stain remover, sewing kit, pain relievers, and everything else for the unexpected.

faqs.question: What hours does the coordinator work on my wedding day?
faqs.answer: Your coordinator typically arrives 2 hours before the ceremony begins and stays through the first hour of the reception — or until all vendors have departed and you're settled for the evening.

faqs.question: Do I need day-of coordination if I have a venue coordinator?
faqs.answer: Venue coordinators manage the venue specifically. Our day-of coordinator works entirely for you — managing all vendors, your personal timeline, and ensuring your vision is executed exactly as planned.

faqs.question: Is Ceremoney free to use?
faqs.answer: Yes! Ceremoney's Basic plan is completely free — no credit card required. It includes your wedding website, RSVP collection, guest list (up to 50 guests), and planning checklist. You can upgrade to Premium or Elite for advanced features.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Premium and Elite?
faqs.answer: Premium (299 SEK/mo) includes unlimited guests, seating chart designer, custom domain, and PDF/XLS export. Elite (499 SEK/mo) adds the stationery designer, QR code entrance scanning, team collaborators, and SMS credits.

faqs.question: Can I create a password-protected wedding website?
faqs.answer: Yes! You can add a password to your wedding website so only invited guests can access it. This keeps your RSVP form and personal details private.

faqs.question: How does RSVP collection work?
faqs.answer: Guests visit your wedding website and fill in the RSVP form — including their name, attendance status, dietary requirements, and plus-one details. All responses appear instantly in your Ceremoney guest list.

faqs.question: Can I manage the bride's and groom's guest lists separately?
faqs.answer: Yes! Every guest in Ceremoney is tagged to either the bride's side or the groom's side. You can filter, view, and export each side's list separately.

faqs.question: How does the seating chart work?
faqs.answer: The seating chart is a drag-and-drop visual designer. Create tables of any shape and size, then drag guest names from your list to assign seats. Export the finished chart as a PDF to share with your venue.

faqs.question: What is QR entrance scanning?
faqs.answer: With Elite, each guest automatically receives a unique QR code (via email or stationery). At your venue entrance, scan the code with any smartphone to check them in. You can see real-time attendance as guests arrive.

faqs.question: Can my wedding planner access my account?
faqs.answer: With Elite, you can invite collaborators (wedding planner, maid of honor, family members) who get access to manage the guest list, RSVPs, and planning tasks alongside you.

faqs.question: Can I connect my own domain to my wedding website?
faqs.answer: Yes! Premium and Elite plans allow you to connect a custom domain (e.g. emma-and-oliver.com) to your Ceremoney wedding website for a fully personalized experience.

faqs.question: How do I export my guest list?
faqs.answer: With Premium or Elite, you can export your complete guest list — including RSVP status, dietary requirements, seating assignments, and contact details — as a PDF or Excel file at any time.

faqs.question: Is my data secure?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Ceremoney uses secure, encrypted storage for all personal data. Guest data is handled in compliance with GDPR, and guests explicitly consent when submitting their RSVP.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can cancel your Premium or Elite subscription at any time. Your account reverts to the free Basic plan and all your data is preserved.

testimonials.name: Emma & Oliver Lindqvist
testimonials.content: Ceremoney made planning our wedding so much easier. The seating chart feature saved us hours, and guests loved how elegant our wedding website looked. We got RSVPs from everyone within the first week!

testimonials.name: Sofia & Ahmed Karlsson
testimonials.content: We used Ceremoney Elite and the QR code entrance scanning was absolutely brilliant. Our venue coordinator was amazed — check-in took seconds for each guest. Worth every öre.

testimonials.name: Maja & Felix Bergström
testimonials.content: As someone who is not tech-savvy at all, I was worried about building a wedding website. Ceremoney was incredibly easy to use. Our website was live in under an hour and looked absolutely beautiful.

testimonials.name: Alicia & Tom Johansson
testimonials.content: The stationery designer in Elite is stunning. We designed our digital invitations to perfectly match our wedding theme and colors. Guests loved receiving them. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Hannah & David Eriksson
testimonials.content: Managing dietary requirements for 120 guests seemed overwhelming. Ceremoney's RSVP system collected everything automatically and we could export a clean list for our caterer. Game changer!

testimonials.name: Isabelle & Marcus Nilsson
testimonials.content: Our wedding planner used the collaborator feature to manage the guest list with us in real time. Having everything in one place — RSVPs, seating, vendor contacts — was invaluable.

legalPages.title: Privacy Policy
legalPages.content:
Privacy Policy

At Ceremoney, we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data in accordance with GDPR.

Data We Collect

We collect information you provide directly: account registration details, wedding project data, and guest information submitted through RSVP forms. Guest data is collected only with explicit GDPR consent.

How We Use Your Data

Your data is used solely to provide and improve Ceremoney's services. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.

Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, export, or delete your data at any time. Contact us at privacy@ceremoney.com to exercise these rights.

Data Retention

We retain your data for as long as your account is active. Upon account deletion, all personal data is permanently removed within 30 days.

legalPages.title: Terms of Service
legalPages.content:
Terms of Service

By using Ceremoney, you agree to these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully.

Use of Service

Ceremoney provides wedding planning tools for personal use by couples planning their wedding. You may not use the platform for commercial purposes without written permission.

Account Responsibility

You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and all activity that occurs under your account.

Guest Data

You are responsible for ensuring that guest data collected through your Ceremoney RSVP forms complies with applicable privacy laws, including obtaining appropriate GDPR consent.

Subscription

Premium and Elite plans are billed monthly. Subscriptions may be cancelled at any time. No refunds are issued for partial months.

Limitation of Liability

Ceremoney is provided as-is. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of the platform.

legalPages.title: GDPR & Data Protection
legalPages.content:
GDPR & Data Protection

Ceremoney is fully compliant with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). This page explains your rights and how we handle personal data.

Data Controller

Ceremoney AB is the data controller for all personal data processed through our platform.

Guest RSVP Data

When guests submit an RSVP through a Ceremoney wedding website, they provide explicit consent for their data to be stored and used for event management purposes. This consent is recorded with a timestamp.

Your Rights Under GDPR

  • Right to access your personal data
  • Right to rectification of inaccurate data
  • Right to erasure (right to be forgotten)
  • Right to data portability
  • Right to object to processing

Data Requests

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@ceremoney.com. We will respond within 30 days.
